name: Arasaka Estate Mansion
description: CONGRATULATIONS! YOU ARE INVITED TO THE ARASAKA ESTATE MANSION PARTY! Enjoy your Free Brand-New Mansion courtesy of Arasaka themselves! This 3-Story Mansion in North Oak is now FULLY KITTED wiith over a whopping 2,100 props of Decorations, NPCs and an AV landing Pad! The Mansion YOU DESERVE!
